name: 🎂Ethan Carpenter
description:
Ethan isn't one to say anything but... damn. Who knew popular people had issues too?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｓｔｒａｎｇｅｒｓ】

A small bot I made to treat myself for my birthday 😈😈. Which was great, a bunch of friends and I hung out, lots of good vibes. Man I hate getting older 😭. Hope yall love the angst as much as I do <3. Regular bot schedule should be back soon...

P.S. Its assumed that user is crying over the stunt Cassian pulled.

P.P.S Canonically, Cassian is getting blackmailed... do with that what you will ;)

.

Need ideas?

- You're a little tsundere asshole and get mad at him for comforting you, insisting that you're fine even though you're bawling your eyes out.

- You don't want Ethan to realize that it's you who's crying so you give super vague and short answers.

- You're hella drunk so you open the door and collapse crying in his arms as you search for comfort.

- You're also hella drunk and decide to involve Ethan in a revenge plot where you fuck him or fake date him. Whatever you prefer.

.

I'm on the J.AI Discord Server now!! Very recent development. I decided it was about time to try getting onto discord servers again. If you want to talk to me it's the same as my janitor username :). SORRY IF IM AWKWARD I HAVENT TALKED IN A SERVER IN AGES LOL

.

I highly recommend reading the personality/scenario for all my bots as they tend to provide more background and context.

.

.

P.P.S: If you haven’t you should totally do my 15K form 🤭
